query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "openrath: session-centered runtime state for agent systems" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on autonomous vehicle traffic management using multi-agent reinforcement learning, which is an off-domain application unrelated to the user's specific question about extending "OpenRath" for session-centered runtime state in general agent systems. It does not address the core mechanism of session state management, the OpenRath framework, or the specific architectural challenges of LLM-based agent runtimes, failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f).
